---
title: "Geometry"
sidebar: references
---

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_references.py; edit specs/dasdae-inventory.yml instead. -->

Geometry for an interval of an optical path, interpreted using the inventory CRS.

Aliases: `Geo`

## Attributes

| Name | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `optical_length` | float | Optical path interval length in meters. |
| `name` | str | Human-readable geometry name. |
| `distance` | tuple[float] | Optical distances paired to coordinates. |
| `coordinates` | tuple[tuple[float, ...], ...] | Coordinate points describing the geometry. |

## Contains

_None._

## Contained By

- [OpticalPath](OpticalPath.qmd)

## References

_None._

## Referenced By

_None._
